product_overview: Call Log is a lightweight Electron desktop app for help-desk and IT teams to quickly record, review, and analyze telephone support interactions. It supports local-first workflows with optional Supabase-backed authentication, cloud sync, realtime updates, and reporting when configured.
core_goals: Enable fast, low-friction capture of structured call records so agents can log calls in under a minute
Make historical call records findable by day with quick navigation, per-day search, and editable entries
Support team awareness via optional cloud sync and realtime updates when Supabase is configured
Provide operational insight through in-app statistics and scheduled reporting (when backend is available)
Maintain secure defaults (RLS, context isolation) and graceful degradation when backend or Electron APIs are unavailable

features.name: Supabase sign-in and sign-up
features.description: Email/password authentication when Supabase is configured; graceful local fallback when not configured.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Open sign-in card from brand area when shown -> Enter email -> Enter password -> Submit credentials -> See authenticated main shell
Navigate to / -> Open sign-in card from brand area when shown -> Enter invalid credentials -> Submit credentials -> See validation or auth error messages
Navigate to / -> Choose Continue with local storage when Supabase is not configured -> See main shell in local mode

features.name: Call intake form
features.description: Capture caller name, organization, telephone, optional device, support request, notes, and adjustable date/time; create a persisted call record in the active data mode.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Fill required fields (caller name, organization, telephone, support request) -> Optionally fill device and notes -> Adjust date and time for the call -> Submit form -> See new call listed for the selected day
Navigate to / -> Leave a required field empty -> Submit form -> See validation error preventing submission
Navigate to / -> Use organization autocomplete when available -> Select suggested organization -> Submit form -> See organization resolved on saved record

features.name: History and calendar
features.description: Browse calls scoped by a selected calendar day, navigate days, and open entries for details or editing.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Change selected day with arrows or Today -> View entries list for the selected day -> Open an entry for details
Navigate to / -> Open calendar modal and pick a date with no saved calls -> See empty entries list for the selected day
Navigate to / -> Change selected day -> See list update to reflect calls for the newly selected day

features.name: Search calls
features.description: Filter the current day's entries with full-text search scoped to the selected day.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Open search -> Type query -> See filtered entries for the selected day -> Close search
Navigate to / -> Open search -> Type query with no matches -> See no-results state for the selected day

features.name: Edit and delete call entries
features.description: Open a saved call to update fields or remove the record with confirmation; edits persist according to active data mode.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Open an entry -> Change one or more fields -> Save changes -> See updated entry in the list for the selected day
Navigate to / -> Open an entry -> Attempt to save invalid data -> See validation error and unchanged record
Navigate to / -> Open an entry -> Initiate delete -> Confirm deletion -> See entry removed from the list
Navigate to / -> Open an entry -> Initiate delete -> Cancel deletion -> See entry remains in the list

features.name: Statistics modal
features.description: Present summary statistics (counts and summaries) for the current context such as the selected day.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Open statistics from toolbar -> See summary stats for the selected day -> Close statistics modal
Navigate to / -> Open statistics from toolbar when there are no calls -> See zero-data or explanatory message in statistics modal

features.name: Reports overlay
features.description: Run or refresh scheduled and on-demand reporting controls when backend reporting functions are configured; otherwise show the unavailable state.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Open Reports -> Refresh or run reports when controls are visible -> See report results or confirmation that reports ran
Navigate to / -> Open Reports when backend reporting is not configured -> See message indicating reports are unavailable or misconfigured

features.name: Account profile
features.description: Update user profile (display name and email) for signed-in users when Supabase auth is active.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Sign in -> Open Account -> Edit display name and email -> Save changes -> See updated profile persisted
Navigate to / -> Attempt to open Account while signed out -> See prompt or message requiring sign-in

features.name: Theme toggle
features.description: Switch between light and dark UI themes; preference persisted when supported by the environment.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Toggle theme preference in the title area -> See UI update to the selected theme -> Reopen app and see persisted preference when supported
Navigate to / -> Toggle theme preference in a non-Electron browser environment -> See no persistent change due to missing desktop APIs and receive graceful fallback

tech_stack: Electron (desktop shell; UI is loadFile index.html)

routes.description: Single-page Call Log UI; auth screen or main shell shown by app state (not URL routing)

features.name: Supabase sign-in and sign-up
features.description: Email and password authentication when Supabase is configured in supabaseConfig.js
user_interactions: Open sign-in card from brand area when shown
Click Log in or Sign up
See validation or auth error messages
Choose Continue with local storage when Supabase is not configured

features.name: Call intake form
features.description: Capture caller name, organization, phone, optional device, support request, notes, and call datetime
user_interactions: Fill required and optional fields on the form
Clear the form or submit to log a call
Adjust date and time for the call

api_calls.endpoint: Supabase REST (insert into calls) when cloud sync is active
Supabase REST (read calls) when cloud sync is active

features.name: History and calendar
features.description: Browse calls by day, open date picker, navigate previous and next day
user_interactions: Change selected day with arrows or Today
Open calendar modal and pick a date
View entries list for the selected day

api_calls.endpoint: Supabase REST (filtered calls by date) when using cloud

features.name: Search calls
features.description: Search within the selected day in the history panel
user_interactions: Open search, type query, close search

features.name: Edit and delete call entries
features.description: Modal to edit fields or delete with confirmation
user_interactions: Open an entry, change fields, save or cancel

api_calls.endpoint: Supabase REST (update call row) when using cloud
Supabase REST (delete call row) when using cloud

features.name: Statistics modal
features.description: Summary stats for the selected day or scope
user_interactions: Open statistics from toolbar and close modal

features.name: Reports overlay
features.description: Scheduled or on-demand reporting UI when backend is configured
user_interactions: Open Reports, refresh, optionally run reports when controls are visible

features.name: Account profile
features.description: Update display name and email for signed-in users
user_interactions: Open Account, edit fields, save or cancel

features.name: Theme toggle
features.description: Switch between light and dark theme
user_interactions: Click theme toggle in title bar

known_limitations.issue: Packaged Electron APIs (IPC, native window chrome) are not available when the same HTML is opened in a normal browser over HTTP
known_limitations.impact: Window control buttons and some desktop-only behavior cannot be exercised in browser-only TestSprite runs

known_limitations.issue: Full Supabase auth and cloud sync require valid supabaseConfig.js credentials and network access to the project
known_limitations.impact: Tests may fall back to local-only mode or show not-configured states
